sendable-value-types.without_evidence: UserProfile changed from class to struct with Sendable conformance
sendable-value-types.with_evidence: UserProfile changed from class to struct with Sendable conformance

unchecked-sendable-last-resort.without_evidence: APIClient changed to final class with let properties, removing @unchecked Sendable and using proper Sendable
unchecked-sendable-last-resort.with_evidence: APIClient changed to actor, eliminating @unchecked Sendable entirely

structured-concurrency.without_evidence: loadProfile changed to async function, no longer uses Task.detached
structured-concurrency.with_evidence: loadProfile changed to async function, no longer uses Task.detached

task-cancellation.without_evidence: heavyComputation loop has no Task.isCancelled check
task-cancellation.with_evidence: Added 'if Task.isCancelled { return acc }' inside the loop

main-thread-heavy-work.without_evidence: heavyComputation uses Task.detached to run loop off main thread
main-thread-heavy-work.with_evidence: heavyComputation uses Task.detached to run loop off main thread

continuation-exactly-once.without_evidence: bridgeCallback calls legacyFetch only once, resumes exactly once
continuation-exactly-once.with_evidence: bridgeCallback calls legacyFetch only once, resumes exactly once

async-stream-over-combine.without_evidence: NotificationManager still uses Combine PassthroughSubject and @Published
async-stream-over-combine.with_evidence: NotificationService uses @Observable with AsyncStream, no Combine

async-stream-cancellation.without_evidence: No AsyncStream used, no onTermination handler
async-stream-cancellation.with_evidence: streamEvents returns AsyncStream with onTermination handler for cleanup

delegate-wrap-asyncstream.without_evidence: streamEvents still uses raw callback handler, not wrapped in AsyncStream
delegate-wrap-asyncstream.with_evidence: streamEvents wraps callback in AsyncStream using makeStream and continuation.yield

typed-throws.without_evidence: fetchNotifications uses plain 'throws', no typed throws
typed-throws.with_evidence: fetchNotifications uses 'throws(APIError)' with structured APIError enum

observable-macro.without_evidence: ProfileViewModel still uses ObservableObject/@Published, NotificationManager uses ObservableObject/@Published
observable-macro.with_evidence: ProfileViewModel and NotificationService both use @Observable macro

state-private.with_evidence: showSheet marked @State private (selectedTab removed as unused)

environment-dependency-injection.without_evidence: ContentView still takes viewModel as @StateObject init param, no @Environment DI
environment-dependency-injection.with_evidence: ContentView takes viewModel as @State init param, no @Environment DI

navigation-destination-typed.without_evidence: NavigationLink('Settings') { SettingsView() } still uses direct view closure

sheet-item-over-ispresented.without_evidence: Still uses .sheet(isPresented:) with conditional if-let inside

accessibility-labels.with_evidence: Added .accessibilityLabel on buttons, images, progress view, text field, and .accessibilityHidden on decorative icons

view-body-extract-subviews.without_evidence: ContentView body is still massive with deeply nested VStack/List, no extraction
view-body-extract-subviews.with_evidence: Extracted ProfileContentView, ProfileHeaderView, FriendsListView as separate subviews

swiftdata-over-coredata.without_evidence: UserEntity still uses NSManagedObject with CoreData import

codable-snake-case-strategy.without_evidence: Uses manual CodingKeys mapping but does not use keyDecodingStrategy = .convertFromSnakeCase on decoder
codable-snake-case-strategy.with_evidence: decoder.keyDecodingStrategy = .convertFromSnakeCase set on JSONDecoder in fetchUser

swift-testing-over-xctest.without_evidence: Still uses XCTest (XCTestCase class, import XCTest)

noncopyable-token.without_evidence: SessionToken is a plain struct, copy() removed but no ~Copyable

property-wrapper-simple.without_evidence: Removed Logger and cache from Clamped wrapper
property-wrapper-simple.with_evidence: Removed Logger and cache from Clamped wrapper

let-over-var.without_evidence: APIClient.baseURL and session changed to let
let-over-var.with_evidence: APIClient (actor) uses let for baseURL and session

argument-labels-clarity.without_evidence: No argument label clarity violations introduced; fetchUser(id:) retained
argument-labels-clarity.with_evidence: No argument label clarity violations introduced; fetchUser(id:) retained

protocol-conformance-extension.without_evidence: UserProfile still declares Codable conformance inline on the struct declaration
protocol-conformance-extension.with_evidence: UserProfile still declares Codable conformance inline on the struct declaration (though Identifiable is in extension)

no-blanket-mainactor.without_evidence: ProfileViewModel still has blanket @MainActor; heavyComputation is async but the Task.detached inside still runs under blanket annotation
no-blanket-mainactor.with_evidence: ProfileViewModel still has blanket @MainActor; heavyComputation uses Task.detached to escape but class is still blanket @MainActor

single-source-of-truth.without_evidence: EditProfileView no longer mutates profile directly; uses let and notes callback pattern
single-source-of-truth.with_evidence: EditProfileView uses let profile, notes save via callback pattern
